title: Project Storyboard
shooting_notes: Shoot in 16:9 and keep essential faces and props inside the central 9:16 area.
Do not place required readable text inside the drawings.

cuts.action: Describe the speaker, listener, background behavior, gesture, and prop movement.
cuts.vertical_crop: Describe the subjects that must remain inside the central 9:16 area.
cuts.sound: Describe music, ambience, and sound effects.

cuts.action: Describe a silent glance, hesitation, interruption, or response.
cuts.vertical_crop: Keep the essential face and gesture inside the central area.
cuts.sound: Describe the transition or room tone.
